rationale: Completes the provider-comment write-back UX as the PR claims. `apps/hyperlocalise-web/src/lib/providers/job-provider-actions.ts` adds a `leave_provider_comment` capability check that calls `getProviderCommentPusher(providerKind)` and, when no pusher exists, returns `{ visible: true, enabled: false, disabledReason: 'This provider connector does not support writing comments back to the TMS yet.' }`. Two new tests in `job-provider-actions.test.ts` cover both 'phrase comment write-back disabled' and 'crowdin enabled' paths. `job-qa-findings-model.ts` adds `ProviderCommentWriteBackStatus` type, `indexProviderCommentWriteBackFromAgentRuns` (filters `kind === 'comment_only'`, sorts by `completedAt ?? createdAt`, applies a priority where posted > skipped > failed so older 'posted' beats later 'failed' retries), `isProviderCommentWriteBackComplete`, and `formatProviderCommentWriteBackLabel` returning 'Comment posted' / 'Already in TMS' / 'Comment failed'. Two model tests verify both indexing and priority preservation. `job-qa-findings-section.tsx` consumes the helper: renders a tone-coloured badge, disables checkboxes for completed write-backs (`disabled={writeBackComplete}` with title attribute), filters `commentableSelectedFindings`, updates the 'Comment on selected' button label to include the count, surfaces 'View provider comment' / 'Could not post provider comment' links, and adjusts the selection cleanup `useEffect` to drop already-completed findings.
